summary: Bind report run/rerun/watch to --report-timeout (default raised 120s->300s) instead of the root --timeout, so async report polling is not cut off at the 60s root default.
reason: Live validation showed GAM reports take ~3-4 min to run; the root --timeout (60s) bounded the poll and defeated --report-timeout, so the headline report commands failed with 'context deadline exceeded'.
validated_outcome: report run/rerun/watch all completed against the live GAM API after the fix: report run created+ran+fetched rows; rerun row_count=1; watch emitted a baseline.
